title: Elemental Odyssey
description: Elemental Odyssey adds 4 new beautiful biomes and adds mobs and ores and items.
body:
Elemental Odyssey adds 4 new beautiful biomes and adds mobs and ores and items.
"Elemental Odyssey" is a Minecraft enhancement mod that takes players on an adventure to explore four mysterious elemental dimensions. Each dimension has unique creatures, resources, and challenges. Players will collect new materials, craft powerful equipment, defeat powerful enemies, and uncover the secrets of the elemental world.
